scripts.start: bun run build:assets && bun run go:start
scripts.dev: bun run build:assets:dev && concurrently -n css,js,templ,go "bun run css:dev" "bun run js:dev" "bun run templ:dev" "bun run go:dev"
scripts.build: bun run build:assets:prod && bun run go:build
scripts.build:assets:dev: concurrently -n css,js,templ "bun run css:build:dev" "bun run js:build" "bun run templ:build"
scripts.build:assets:prod: concurrently -n css,js,templ "bun run css:build:prod" "bun run js:build" "bun run templ:build"
scripts.templ:dev: nodemon --signal SIGTERM -e templ -w "./**" -x bun run templ:build
scripts.go:dev: nodemon --signal SIGTERM -e go,css,js -w "./**" -x bun run go:start --persist-sessions --session-path session.bbolt --log-level debug
